content.text: I will inspect the generated translated page without editing it.

input.content:
# Eval trace source note

This source documentation note is outside generated translated docs.

content.text: I will verify generated translated docs stayed untouched.

fixture_files_snapshot..eval-fixtures/task.sh:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path

path = Path("docs/zh/index.md")
text = path.read_text()
path.write_text(text.replace("search:\n  exclude: true", "search:\n  exclude: false", 1))
PY

agent_output:

- **Verified** that no generated docs (`ja`, `ko`, `zh`) were modified.
- **Created** `docs/eval_trace_source_note.md` — the source documentation note, placed outside any generated/translated docs directory.
